title: Senior Site Engineer (A1 Construction | MNC) DT
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Coordinate efforts across consultants, subcontractors, and suppliers to ensure timely submission, review, and approval of shop drawings, material samples, and construction methodologies.
  • Act as a central point of communication on site, proactively sharing design updates, technical changes, and construction progress with all relevant stakeholders.
  • Represent the site team in technical and coordination meetings with clients, owners, and consultants to address construction challenges and drive timely resolution.
  • Oversee on-site construction activities to ensure all works are executed in accordance with approved drawings, technical specifications, and statutory authority requirements.
  • Enforce quality standards by identifying non-conformances and ensuring corrective actions are implemented promptly by subcontractors.
  • Work closely with consultants, subcontractors, and suppliers to resolve technical and site-related issues efficiently, minimizing disruption to the construction schedule.
  • Maintain comprehensive and well-organized project records in line with ISO standards and internal quality management systems.
  • Support the preparation and coordination of documentation for regulatory and authority submissions, including inspections and applications.
  • Assist the site management team with construction planning, sequencing, and coordination to meet project milestones.
  • Ensure all site activities are carried out in compliance with the company’s safety policies and statutory workplace safety and health regulations, working closely with the safety team.


Qualifications & Requirements

Bachelor’s Degree in Civil & Structural Engineering.
Minimally 10 years of hands-on experience in structural construction, site supervision, and technical coordination.
Strong technical knowledge of structural works, construction methodologies, and site execution.
Proven experience in managing shop drawings, method statements, and authority-related submissions.
Excellent communication, coordination, and problem-solving skills with the ability to engage effectively with multiple stakeholders.
Highly-organized and capable of managing multiple priorities and deadlines in a fast-paced project environment.

Attention to: Debbie Tan | 82115165

By submitting any application or résumé to us, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us disclosing your personal information to prospective employers for their consideration.

We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. All applications will be treated with the strictest confidence.

Elitez Pte Ltd | EA Licence: 16C8004| Hailey YANG | Registrations No: R1876431
